notInstalled.title: Connect your apps
notInstalled.body: Houston uses an integrations provider to let your agent use Gmail, Slack, Google Drive, and 100+ other services on your behalf. The default provider is Composio. One-time install, about 80 MB.

needsAuth.title: Connect your integrations provider
needsAuth.body: Sign in to your integrations provider so your agent can use Gmail, Slack, Google Drive, and 100+ other services on your behalf. We use Composio by default.

reconnect.openedBody: Finish signing in again in your browser, then come back here.

disconnect.confirmBody: Your agent will lose access to {{name}}. You can reconnect it anytime.

signOut.confirmBody: You'll need to sign in again and reconnect any apps you use. This won't uninstall the provider.

authDialog.title: Connecting your integrations provider
authDialog.description: Complete the sign-in in your browser, then return here.
authDialog.waiting: Waiting for you to approve in the browser…

cloudSync.bannerDescription: Copy your apps to this cloud agent in one tap. Gmail and your other apps will work without connecting again.
cloudSync.success: Your apps are ready in the cloud. No need to connect them again.
cloudSync.failed: Could not copy Composio to the cloud
cloudSync.needsLocalTitle: Sign in on this computer first
cloudSync.needsLocalDescription: Open Integrations while using a local agent, sign in to Composio, then try again.
